headline: This 1 Exxon Income ETF Is Paying Up Big, But There Is A Catch
summary: If you bought YieldMax XOM Option Income Strategy ETF (NYSEARCA:XOMO) a year ago for the headline yield, you collected a steady stream of weekly checks while Exxon Mobil (NYSE:XOM) shares ran from roughly $103 to almost $154. headline: Texas Jury Clears Exxon Mobil in Investor Lawsuit Over Oil Sands and Gas Assets (XOM)
summary: A Texas jury ruled on Wednesday that Exxon Mobil (NYSE:XOM) was not liable in a lawsuit accusing the energy giant of misleading investors through disclosures connected to its Canadian oil sands business and Rocky Mountain natural gas operations. Investors Failed to Prove Fraud ClaimsThe case, originally filed in 2016, alleged that Exxon hid losses tied to its Canadian bitumen assets, failed to properly reflect carbon-cost assumptions in reserve valuations, and postponed impairment charges relate
